/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/cobot_interfaces/libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/cobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/cobot_interfaces/msg/_observation_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/brian/miniconda3/lib:/home/brian/Projects/Cobot/ros2_cobot/build/cobot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /home/brian/miniconda3/lib/libpython3.13.so libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libcobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
